LanguageData.Ammo_PlasmaGasCartridge_Standard.label: Plasma Gas Cartridges
LanguageData.Ammo_PlasmaGasCartridge_Standard.descrip: Plasma gas ammo used by advanced blaster designs. Standard general-purpose tibanna-gas based plasma bolts, effective against most targets and lighter armours.
LanguageData.Ammo_PlasmaGasCartridge_AP.label: Plasma Gas Cartridges (Conc.)
LanguageData.Ammo_PlasmaGasCartridge_AP.description: Plasma gas ammo used by advanced blaster designs. A concentrated high-pressure refinement process produces plasma bolts capable of piercing hardened armour more effectively.
LanguageData.Ammo_PlasmaGasCartridge_Ion.label: Plasma Gas Cartridges (Ion)
LanguageData.Ammo_PlasmaGasCartridge_Ion.description: Plasma gas ammo used by advanced blaster designs. Specialized particle induction causes ionization effects on bolt impacts, increasing effectiveness against mechanical targets.
LanguageData.Ammo_PlasmaGasCartridge_Stun.label: Plasma Gas Cartridges (Stun)
LanguageData.Ammo_PlasmaGasCartridge_Stun.description: Plasma gas ammo used by advanced blaster designs. Modulated energy pulse emission generates a non-lethal pulse that can disable organics, but is highly ineffective against mechanical targets.
LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterPistol_Red.label: bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterPistol_RedAP.label: bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterRifle_Red.label: bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterRifle_RedAP.label: bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterSniper_Red.label: bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterSniper_RedAP.label: bullet

LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterRifle_GreenAP.label: bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterSniper_Green.label: bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterSniper_GreenAP.label: bullet

LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterRifle_Blue.label: bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterRifle_BlueAP.label: bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterSniper_Blue.label: bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterSniper_BlueAP.label: bullet

LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterBolt_Scatter.label: bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterBolt_DualShot.label: bullet

LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterBolt_DualShotIon.label: bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_BlasterBolt_DualShotStun.label: bullet
LanguageData.Ammo_OR_MiniRocket_Standard.label: standard minirocket
LanguageData.Ammo_OR_MiniRocket_Standard.description: A small but nonetheless extremely deadly miniaturized rocket, designed to be launched from wrist-mounted weapon platforms.
LanguageData.Bullet_OR_WristRocket.label: wrist rocket
LanguageData.Bullet_OR_KnockoutDart.label: bullet
LanguageData.Ammo_RPS6_HEDP.label: RPS-6 rocket
LanguageData.Ammo_RPS6_HEDP.description: A powerful rocket first used in the Galactic Republic's RPS-6. Old caches have been repurposed by the Rebel Alliance for use in the HH-12 launcher. The dual-purpose missile is lethal to both vehicles and infantry alike.
LanguageData.Bullet_RPS6_HEDP.label: RPS-6 Rocket
